title: 'Mahou Shoujo Madoka★Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, Trailer
content: The official website of the Mahou Shoujo Madoka★Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten (Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie - Walpurgisnacht: Rising) anime film unveiled additional cast, staff, and a trailer on Thursday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You Unveils New Visual, Additional Cast
content: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You anime unveiled a new visual with four additional cast members. It was also announced that the series will stream on ABEMA on June 3. Asahi Production is animating the series. Zutomayo and imase are performing the opening and ending theme songs, respectively.
author: Anime Corner

title: Madoka Magica -Walpurgisnacht: Rising- Anime Film's 3rd Trailer Reveals 2 New Magical Girls, More Staff
content: Aniplex started streaming on Thursday the third full trailer for Puella Magi Madoka Magica The Movie: Walpurgisnacht: Rising - ( Gekijōban Mahō Shōjo Madoka Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten ), the official sequel to the Puella Magi Madoka Magica The Movie Part 3: Rebellion film .
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia: More Sequel Anime Episode Reveals Preview Images
content: My Hero Academia: More sequel anime episode revealed more preview images ahead of its premiere this weekend. The episode adapts the additional epilogue chapter included in the manga’s final Volume 42 and is scheduled to premiere on May 2.
author: Anime Corner

title: Chainsaw Man: Reze Arc Movie Begins Streaming on Crunchyroll Today
content: Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc officially begins streaming on Crunchyroll today, beginning the platform’s 2026 Ani-May celebration . The film premiered in theaters 2025, winning the title of the Anime Movie of the Year at our 6th yearly awards .
author: Anime Corner

title: Webtoon, Kadokawa Launch Studio White for Webcomics Starting With Lodoss Spinoff
content: LINE Digital Frontier , part of WEBTOON Entertainment, has announced the launch of Studio White, a new webcomic production label created in collaboration with Kadokawa and RedIce Studio.
author: ANN

title: Gou Tanabe Launches Manga of H.P. Lovecraft's The Case of Charles Dexter Ward Novella
content: Manga creator Gou Tanabe launched a manga adaptation of H.P. Lovecraft 's The Case of Charles Dexter Ward ( Charles Ward no Kikai na Jiken ) horror novella in Kadokawa 's KadoComi website (under the Comic Beam label) on April 1.
author: ANN

title: 10 Best Anime to Watch on Netflix in May 2026
content: As the exciting April 2026 draws near its end, Netflix is all set for its May lineup. The platform will confirm the return of some of the biggest anime ever, including Assassination Classroom and Jujutsu Kaisen Season 2, which weren’t available in the U.S library.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action GTO: Great Teacher Onizuka Show Gets New Series in July
content: Fuji TV and Kansai TV announced on Thursday that they are producing a new live-action series based on Tohru Fujisawa 's GTO: Great Teacher Onizuka manga that will premiere on Kansai TV , Fuji TV , and affiliated channels on July 20 at 10:00 p.m. (9:00 a.m. EDT).
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s Best Sports Anime of 2025 Achieves Major Box Office Milestone
content: Based on Uoto’s acclaimed manga, the anime film adaptation of 100 Meters hit Japanese theaters in September 2025 and became a massive hit. The manga was serialized from 2018 to 2019, but never received the global recognition it deserved.
author: ComicBook
